title: Availability, Disaster Recovery, and Validation · Operations Brief: Net Dr Sites
summary: Define recovery objectives and prove branch, service, configuration, and site recovery under realistic failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net dr sites increment in a tested network continuity plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare cold, warm, and hot sites by readiness, data, network, staffing, cost, and activation time.
Use MTTR and MTBF as population and process indicators without treating averages as individual guarantees.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook

# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
